variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will anyone other than Carlos Alcaraz and Jannik Sinner win a major in 2026 (men's tennis)?

variables.name: australian_open_2026_winner_status
variables.description: Whether the winner of the 2026 Australian Open is someone other than Carlos Alcaraz or Jannik Sinner. (Note: The tournament ends on Feb 1, 2026, which is the current date in this scenario).

variables.name: combined_slams_missed_alcaraz_sinner
variables.description: The total number of Grand Slam tournaments in 2026 that either Alcaraz or Sinner fails to enter or completes with a retirement due to injury.

variables.name: top_ten_avg_elo_gap
variables.description: The average Elo rating difference between the Alcaraz/Sinner duo and the rest of the ATP Top 10 as of May 1, 2026.

variables.name: external_finalist_count
variables.description: The total number of unique players other than Alcaraz and Sinner who reach a Grand Slam final in 2026.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will a new multilateral security agreement involving at least three Middle East and North Africa (MENA) states (excluding Iran, Saudi Arabia, Turkey, and Israel) be publicly announced by 30 June 2026?

variables.name: high_level_mena_defense_summits
variables.description: Number of high-level multilateral defense or security summits attended by at least three of the specified MENA states between Feb 2026 and June 2026.

variables.name: joint_military_exercises_count
variables.description: The number of distinct joint military exercises conducted involving at least three of the eligible MENA states (excluding the four major powers) between Jan 2025 and May 2026.

variables.name: formal_security_intent_declaration
variables.description: Whether a joint communique or declaration of intent to deepen multilateral security cooperation is issued by at least three target MENA states prior to the final agreement.

variables.name: regional_conflict_intensity_index
variables.description: An index representing the average number of monthly reported cross-border security incidents in the MENA region during the first half of 2026; high levels often catalyze security pacts.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will  an attempt be made to fire Jerome Powell before the end of his term?

variables.name: formal_legal_opinion_issued
variables.description: Whether the Office of Legal Counsel (OLC) or the Department of Justice issues a formal written opinion explicitly stating that the President has the legal authority to remove the Chair of the Federal Reserve without cause.

variables.name: fed_funds_rate_change
variables.description: The net change in the federal funds rate target by the FOMC between February 1, 2026, and May 1, 2026. A lower or negative value indicates the Fed is cutting rates as demanded by the administration.

variables.name: trump_public_demand_for_resignation
variables.description: The number of distinct calendar days on which President Trump publicly posts or speaks a direct demand for Jerome Powell to resign or be 'fired' between February 1, 2026, and May 15, 2026.

variables.name: court_ruling_on_independent_agencies
variables.description: Whether a US federal court (District, Appeals, or Supreme Court) issues a ruling in 2026 prior to May 15 that weakens the 'for cause' removal protections for heads of independent agencies like the FTC or NCUA.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will the FDA have authorized a medical device that incorporates LLM-based functionality by 31 March 2026?

variables.name: fda_final_guidance_llm
variables.description: Has the FDA issued a final (non-draft) guidance document specifically addressing the clinical use or regulatory submission requirements for Large Language Models (LLMs) or Generative AI in medical devices?

variables.name: ai_ml_authorized_devices_count
variables.description: The total number of AI/ML-enabled medical devices authorized (cleared or approved) by the FDA as listed in its official database as of January 1, 2026.

variables.name: pccp_submissions_count
variables.description: The estimated number of marketing submissions to the FDA that include a Predetermined Change Control Plan (PCCP) for AI-enabled software by the end of 2025.

variables.name: public_llm_presubmission_feedback
variables.description: Have at least two distinct companies publicly confirmed (via press release, SEC filing, or industry conference) that they received formal FDA feedback on a Pre-Submission (Q-Sub) specifically for a medical device where an LLM is the core functional component?

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will Russia capture Kostyantynivka by March 31?

variables.name: control_of_chasiv_yar
variables.description: Whether Russian forces have established control over the entire administrative area of Chasiv Yar, which is a major defensive high-ground obstacle on the path to Kostyantynivka.

variables.name: distance_from_frontline_km
variables.description: The minimum distance between the Russian forward line of advance and the Kostyantynivka railroad station as of March 1, 2026. A distance of 0 indicates the station or area beyond it has been reached.

variables.name: russian_artillery_fire_intensity
variables.description: The estimated average daily shells fired by Russian forces in the Bakhmut-Kostyantynivka sector during February 2026, scaled to units of 1,000 shells per day.

variables.name: uaf_withdrawal_from_toretsk
variables.description: Whether the Ukrainian Armed Forces (UAF) have fully withdrawn from the Toretsk urban area, which would allow Russian forces to threaten Kostyantynivka from the south.

variables.name: target
variables.description:
The literal answer to the main question: Will there be more than ten times as many 'Battles' in Saudi Arabia for the 30 days before 2026-02-08 compared to one plus the 30-day average of 'Battles' over the 360 days preceding 2026-02-01?

e.g. If the forecast due date is 2024-01-01 and we have the following data:
Date,'Battles'
2023-11-11,1
2023-10-10,2
to calculate one plus the 30-day average of 'Battles' over the preceding 360 days, we’d have: 1+(1+2)/12=1.25.

In this example, for the question to resolve positively, 13 (10 x 1.25) or more 'Battles' would need to occur in the 30 days leading up to the resolution.

variables.name: baseline_battles_saudi_arabia
variables.description: The total number of 'Battles' recorded by ACLED in Saudi Arabia during the 360-day period preceding 2026-02-01.

variables.name: yemen_saudi_border_conflict_intensity
variables.description: The number of 'Battles' in the 30-day target period occurring specifically in the provinces bordering Yemen (Jazan, Najran, and Asir).

variables.name: major_internal_insurgency_escalation
variables.description: Occurrence of a significant armed insurgency or civil unrest involving at least 5 distinct battle events within major Saudi urban centers (Riyadh, Jeddah, or Dammam) in the target 30-day window.

variables.name: houthis_saudi_ceasefire_status
variables.description: Whether a formal, recognized ceasefire between the Houthi movement and Saudi-led forces is officially in effect for at least 15 days of the 30-day target period.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: What is the probability that the daily average temperature at the French weather station at Pamandzi will be higher on 2026-02-08 than on 2026-02-01?

variables.name: avg_temp_pamandzi_feb_01
variables.description: Daily average temperature at the Pamandzi weather station on February 1, 2026.

variables.name: avg_temp_pamandzi_feb_08
variables.description: Daily average temperature at the Pamandzi weather station on February 8, 2026.

variables.name: february_climatological_temp_trend
variables.description: The historical average change in daily mean temperature at Pamandzi between February 1st and February 8th based on long-term climate data (1991-2020).

variables.name: cyclone_activity_impact
variables.description: Presence of a tropical cyclone or significant depression within 500km of Mayotte on February 8, 2026, which typically causes increased cloud cover and lower average temperatures.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: What is the probability that the daily average temperature at the French weather station at Clermont-Ferrand Auvergne Airport will be higher on 2026-02-08 than on 2026-02-01?

variables.name: clermont_avg_temp_feb_01
variables.description: The daily average temperature at Clermont-Ferrand Auvergne Airport on 2026-02-01.

variables.name: clermont_avg_temp_feb_08
variables.description: The daily average temperature at Clermont-Ferrand Auvergne Airport on 2026-02-08.

variables.name: zonal_flow_index_europe
variables.description: The strength of the westerly wind flow over Western Europe during the first week of February 2026, where positive values indicate a stronger Atlantic influence (milder) and negative values indicate blocking (colder).

variables.name: temp_anomaly_central_france
variables.description: The deviation of the 7-day mean temperature (Feb 2 to Feb 8) from the 30-year climatological norm in Central France.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will the Chicago Board Options Exchange's Crude Oil ETF Volatility Index have increased by 2026-02-08 as compared to its value on 2026-02-01?

variables.name: wti_crude_price_change
variables.description: The percentage change in the WTI crude oil spot price between February 1 and February 8, 2026. High price volatility or sharp trends usually correlate with higher OVX values.

variables.name: major_geopolitical_escalation
variables.description: Whether a significant geopolitical event (e.g., new military conflict or major sanctions) affecting oil-producing regions is reported by major news outlets between February 1 and February 8, 2026.

variables.name: vix_index_change
variables.description: The absolute change in the CBOE Volatility Index (VIX) between February 1 and February 8, 2026. Broad market volatility often spills over into commodity volatility.

variables.name: opec_plus_policy_surprise
variables.description: Whether OPEC+ announces an unscheduled or surprising change in production targets during the week of February 1 to February 8, 2026.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will the price of Brent crude oil have increased by 2026-02-08 as compared to its value on 2026-02-01?

variables.name: weekly_brent_price_volatility
variables.description: The annualized standard deviation of daily log returns for Brent crude oil over the week preceding 2026-02-08, reflecting market stability.

variables.name: opec_plus_production_cut_extension
variables.description: Whether OPEC+ has officially announced or maintained an extension of voluntary production cuts during the first week of February 2026.

variables.name: global_oil_demand_growth_forecast
variables.description: The projected year-over-year change in global oil demand for Q1 2026 as reported by the IEA or EIA in their most recent monthly report prior to 2026-02-08.

variables.name: geopolitical_risk_index_spike
variables.description: Whether a major geopolitical event (e.g., conflict in a key transit chokepoint or oil-producing region) occurred between 2026-02-01 and 2026-02-08 that caused a price premium.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: According to Wikipedia, will R Praggnanandhaa have an Elo rating on 2026-02-08 that's at least 1% higher than on 2026-02-01?

variables.name: february_2026_rating_change
variables.description: The net change in R Praggnanandhaa's official FIDE Elo rating between the January 2026 list and the February 2026 list.

variables.name: wikipedia_update_latency
variables.description: The number of days after the first of the month it takes for the Wikipedia 'FIDE rankings' page to be updated with the newest monthly official ratings.

variables.name: tata_steel_2026_performance
variables.description: The total Elo rating change gained or lost by Praggnanandhaa during the 2026 Tata Steel Chess Tournament (typically held in late January).

variables.name: pragg_january_2026_rating
variables.description: R Praggnanandhaa's official FIDE Elo rating as of January 1, 2026.

variables.name: target
variables.description:
The literal answer to the main question: Will CRL's market close price on 2026-02-08 be higher than its market close price on 2026-02-01?

Stock splits and reverse splits will be accounted for in resolving this question. Forecasts on questions about companies that have been delisted (through mergers or bankruptcy) will resolve to their final close price.

variables.name: crl_q4_earnings_surprise
variables.description: The percentage difference between Charles River Laboratories' reported earnings per share (EPS) and the consensus analyst estimate for the quarter ending December 2025 (typically reported in early February).

variables.name: sp500_weekly_return
variables.description: The percentage change in the S&P 500 index from the market close on February 1, 2026, to the market close on February 8, 2026, reflecting general market sentiment.

variables.name: healthcare_sector_relative_performance
variables.description: The percentage change of the Health Care Select Sector SPDR Fund (XLV) relative to the S&P 500 during the first week of February 2026.

variables.name: crl_fy2026_guidance_revision
variables.description: Whether Charles River Laboratories issues a formal update to its full-year 2026 revenue or EPS guidance that is higher than previous management projections during the early February earnings call.

variables.name: target
variables.description:
The literal answer to the main question: Will XOM's market close price on 2026-02-08 be higher than its market close price on 2026-02-01?

Stock splits and reverse splits will be accounted for in resolving this question. Forecasts on questions about companies that have been delisted (through mergers or bankruptcy) will resolve to their final close price.

variables.name: brent_crude_weekly_change
variables.description: The percentage change in the price of Brent Crude oil futures between the market close on February 1, 2026, and February 8, 2026.

variables.name: xom_q4_earnings_surprise
variables.description: The percentage difference between Exxon Mobil's reported earnings per share (EPS) and the consensus analyst estimate for the quarter ending December 31, 2025, typically reported in late January or early February 2026.

variables.name: energy_sector_etf_performance
variables.description: The percentage change in the Energy Select Sector SPDR Fund (XLE) price between the market close on February 1, 2026, and February 8, 2026, representing broader sector trends.

variables.name: major_geopolitical_disruption_event
variables.description: A binary indicator of whether a major geopolitical event (e.g., new conflict in a major oil-producing region or a significant supply-side sanction) occurs between February 1 and February 8, 2026, that causes a 5% or greater intraday spike in oil prices.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will Elon Musk be worth more than $1 Trillion by Jan 1st, 2029?

variables.name: tesla_stock_price_2028
variables.description: The closing price of Tesla (TSLA) stock on the last trading day of 2028, adjusted for any splits occurring after February 2026.

variables.name: spacex_valuation_2028
variables.description: The estimated post-money valuation of SpaceX based on its most recent funding round or secondary market sale as of December 31st, 2028.

variables.name: xai_equity_value_musk
variables.description: The estimated value of Elon Musk's personal equity stake in xAI Corp as of late 2028.

variables.name: tesla_fsd_level_5_achieved
variables.description: Whether Tesla has officially released a software update to consumer vehicles that enables Level 5 autonomous driving (as defined by SAE) in at least one major global market by the end of 2028.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will Wagner Moura win the Academy Award for Best Actor at the 2026 Academy Awards?

variables.name: sag_award_best_actor_win
variables.description: Whether Wagner Moura wins the Screen Actors Guild (SAG) Award for Outstanding Performance by a Male Actor in a Leading Role in 2026. SAG winners have a very high correlation with Oscar winners.

variables.name: bafta_best_actor_win
variables.description: Whether Wagner Moura wins the BAFTA Award for Best Actor in a Leading Role in 2026, serving as a key precursor for Academy Award success.

variables.name: betting_market_implied_probability
variables.description: The average implied probability of Wagner Moura winning Best Actor across major betting markets (e.g., Betfair, Ladbrokes) one week before the ceremony.

variables.name: metacritic_score_the_secret_agent
variables.description: The Metascore for the film 'The Secret Agent'. High critical acclaim for the film often bolsters the chances of its lead actor in a competitive field.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will Barack Obama be arrested before July 2026?

variables.name: federal_indictment_obama
variables.description: Whether a federal grand jury returns an indictment against Barack Obama before July 1, 2026. An indictment is a necessary legal precursor for a federal arrest in the context of the treason allegations described.

variables.name: doj_special_counsel_appointment
variables.description: Whether the U.S. Department of Justice officially appoints a Special Counsel specifically tasked with investigating Barack Obama for treason or election interference by April 2026.

variables.name: public_approval_prosecution
variables.description: The percentage of the American public that supports the criminal prosecution of Barack Obama, as measured by a major national poll (e.g., YouGov, Quinnipiac, or Gallup) conducted between February 2026 and June 2026.

variables.name: trump_truth_social_mentions
variables.description: The average weekly number of posts (including 're-truths') by Donald Trump on Truth Social that mention 'Obama' and 'treason' or 'arrest' during the period of March 2026 to May 2026.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will Jama'at Nusrat al-Islam wal-Muslimin (JNIM) take control of Bamako, Mali by 1 June 2026?

variables.name: jnim_capture_segou
variables.description: Whether JNIM takes control of Ségou, a strategic city and regional capital located approximately 235 km northeast of Bamako, before June 1, 2026. Control of Ségou is a likely operational prerequisite for a full-scale assault on the capital.

variables.name: russian_africa_corps_presence
variables.description: The estimated number of Russian Africa Corps (formerly Wagner) personnel active in Mali on May 1, 2026. A significant drawdown or withdrawal of these forces would greatly increase the probability of a successful JNIM offensive on Bamako.

variables.name: malian_military_defections
variables.description: Whether there is a publicly reported mass defection or mutiny of at least one entire battalion-sized unit (approx. 300+ soldiers) of the Malian Armed Forces (FAMa) to JNIM or an abandonment of their posts during a JNIM advance between February 15, 2026, and June 1, 2026.

variables.name: bamako_fuel_price_index
variables.description: The black market price of one liter of gasoline in Bamako on May 15, 2026, relative to the official price on February 15, 2026. This measures the effectiveness of the blockade; a high multiplier indicates extreme state fragility and logistical collapse.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will the United Nations Security Council adopt a resolution related to the conflict in Sudan by 1 May 2026?

variables.name: unsc_sudan_draft_resolutions
variables.description: Number of draft resolutions concerning the Sudan conflict formally circulated to or tabled before the UN Security Council between February 15, 2026, and April 30, 2026.

variables.name: russia_china_veto_usage
variables.description: Whether Russia or China exercises a veto on any draft resolution specifically regarding the Sudan conflict between February 15, 2026, and May 1, 2026.

variables.name: unitams_successor_mandate_discussion
variables.description: Whether the UN Security Council holds a formal meeting specifically to discuss a new mandate or successor mission for monitoring the conflict in Sudan before May 1, 2026.

variables.name: sudan_ipc_famine_classification
variables.description: The number of regions in Sudan classified as 'IPC Phase 5 (Famine)' in official Integrated Food Security Phase Classification reports released between February 2026 and April 2026.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will Israel win Eurovision 2026?

variables.name: israel_participation_confirmed
variables.description: Whether Israel is officially included in the final list of participating countries for Eurovision 2026 as released by the EBU.

variables.name: betting_odds_rank_israel
variables.description: Israel's average rank in the aggregate betting market odds (e.g., Eurovisionworld) one week before the Grand Final. A rank of 1 means they are the favorite.

variables.name: israel_televote_points_share
variables.description: The percentage of the total available televote points in the Grand Final awarded to Israel.

variables.name: ebu_security_disqualification
variables.description: Whether the EBU or the host broadcaster officially disqualifies or bars Israel from competing in the 2026 contest due to security concerns or political controversy.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will Alibaba have the best AI model at the end of February 2026?

variables.name: qwen_highest_elo_score
variables.description: The highest Elo score achieved by any Alibaba Qwen model on the Chatbot Arena (LMSYS) leaderboard by February 28, 2026.

variables.name: competitor_top_elo_score
variables.description: The highest Elo score achieved by any non-Alibaba model (e.g., from OpenAI, Anthropic, or Google) on the Chatbot Arena leaderboard at the end of February 2026.

variables.name: qwen_max_model_release_date
variables.description: The number of months between the release of Alibaba's most advanced model available in February 2026 and February 28, 2026. A lower number indicates a more recent release, which often correlates with higher leaderboard performance.

variables.name: us_export_control_tightening
variables.description: Whether the US government implements significantly stricter compute/chip export controls specifically targeting Chinese AI labs between February 2025 and February 2026, potentially hindering Alibaba's training capabilities.

variables.name: target
variables.description:
The literal answer to the main question: Will there be more than ten times as many 'Protests' in Azerbaijan for the 30 days before 2026-02-22 compared to one plus the 30-day average of 'Protests' over the 360 days preceding 2026-02-15?

e.g. If the forecast due date is 2024-01-01 and we have the following data:
Date,'Protests'
2023-11-11,1
2023-10-10,2
to calculate one plus the 30-day average of 'Protests' over the preceding 360 days, we’d have: 1+(1+2)/12=1.25.

In this example, for the question to resolve positively, 13 (10 x 1.25) or more 'Protests' would need to occur in the 30 days leading up to the resolution.

variables.name: historical_protest_baseline
variables.description: The average number of 'Protests' in Azerbaijan per 30-day period over the 360 days preceding February 15, 2026.

variables.name: significant_election_unrest
variables.description: Whether a national election (presidential or parliamentary) is scheduled or occurs in Azerbaijan between January 1, 2026, and February 22, 2026, which typically triggers spikes in protest activity.

variables.name: target_period_protest_count
variables.description: The total number of 'Protest' events recorded by ACLED in Azerbaijan during the 30-day window from January 23, 2026, to February 22, 2026.

variables.name: karabakh_related_civil_mobilization
variables.description: Whether there is a recorded surge in civil demonstrations related to border disputes or territorial administration in the Nagorno-Karabakh region during the target window.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will the euro short-term rate (volume-weighted trimmed mean), a measure of the borrowing costs of banks in the euro area, have increased by 2026-02-22 as compared to its value on 2026-02-15?

variables.name: ecb_deposit_facility_rate_change
variables.description: Whether the European Central Bank (ECB) Governing Council announces or implements a change in the Deposit Facility Rate between 2026-02-15 and 2026-02-22.

variables.name: excess_liquidity_eurozone_change
variables.description: The change in the total amount of excess liquidity in the Eurosystem (holdings in the deposit facility and current account holdings in excess of minimum reserve requirements) between the reporting dates.

variables.name: estr_volatility_index
variables.description: The standard deviation of the daily €STR values over the 30-day period leading up to 2026-02-15, reflecting the baseline market noise.

variables.name: target2_settlement_volume_delta
variables.description: The percentage change in the total volume of transactions used to calculate the €STR on 2026-02-22 compared to 2026-02-15.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: What is the probability that the daily average temperature at the French weather station at Brest Bretagne Airport will be higher on 2026-02-22 than on 2026-02-15?

variables.name: brest_avg_temp_feb_15
variables.description: The daily average temperature at Brest Bretagne Airport on 2026-02-15 as reported by Météo-France.

variables.name: brest_avg_temp_feb_22
variables.description: The daily average temperature at Brest Bretagne Airport on 2026-02-22 as reported by Météo-France.

variables.name: north_atlantic_oscillation_index
variables.description: The daily NAO index value on 2026-02-22, which significantly influences winter weather patterns and temperatures in Western France.

variables.name: is_maritime_airmass_dominant
variables.description: Whether a maritime airmass (associated with milder temperatures in winter for Brest) is the primary influence on the region's weather on 2026-02-22.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will the market yield on US treasury securities at 3-month constant maturity, quoted on an investment basis, have increased by 2026-02-22 as compared to its value on 2026-02-15?

variables.name: fed_funds_effective_rate_change
variables.description: The change in the Effective Federal Funds Rate (EFFR) between the start and end of the forecast week, which heavily influences the 3-month yield floor.

variables.name: fomc_meeting_within_period
variables.description: Whether a Federal Open Market Committee (FOMC) meeting is scheduled to conclude between 2026-02-15 and 2026-02-22, which typically triggers significant yield adjustments.

variables.name: one_week_yield_volatility
variables.description: The standard deviation of daily changes in the 3-month Treasury yield over the 30 days preceding 2026-02-15, indicating the expected noise level in the market.

variables.name: market_implied_rate_path_slope
variables.description: The difference between the 6-month and 3-month Treasury yields on 2026-02-15, indicating market expectations for the direction of near-term interest rates.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: According to Wikipedia, will a vaccine have been developed for Heartland virus disease by 2026-02-22?

variables.name: clinical_trial_phase_status
variables.description: The highest clinical trial phase (1, 2, or 3) achieved for any Heartland virus vaccine candidate as of February 2026.

variables.name: fda_fast_track_designation
variables.description: Whether any regulatory body (FDA, EMA, etc.) has granted a Fast Track or Breakthrough Therapy designation for a Heartland virus vaccine by Feb 2026.

variables.name: total_heartland_virus_cases
variables.description: The cumulative number of laboratory-confirmed Heartland virus disease cases reported to the CDC as of the most recent 2025 update.

variables.name: wikipedia_vaccine_column_status
variables.description: Whether the 'Vaccine' column for Heartland virus on the Wikipedia 'List of infectious diseases' page contains any text other than 'None', 'No', 'N/A', or 'Under development' as of February 15, 2026.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: According to Wikipedia, will Evgeniia Chikunova still hold the world record for 200m breaststroke in long course (50 metres) swimming pools on 2026-02-22?

variables.name: wikipedia_pending_entry
variables.description: Whether the Wikipedia page for swimming world records already lists a time faster than 2:17.55 (even if unratified and marked with #) for the women's 200m breaststroke long course as of February 15, 2026.

variables.name: major_competition_active
variables.description: Whether a World Aquatics-sanctioned international long-course competition (such as the World Championships, Olympic Games, or a major Continental Championship) is occurring between February 15 and February 22, 2026.

variables.name: fastest_rival_time
variables.description: The fastest time in seconds recorded by any female swimmer other than Evgeniia Chikunova in the 200m breaststroke (long course) in the 365 days preceding February 15, 2026.

variables.name: elite_swimmer_count
variables.description: The number of unique female swimmers who have recorded a performance of 2:20.00 or faster in the 200m breaststroke (long course) during the 24 months preceding February 15, 2026.

variables.name: target
variables.description:
The literal answer to the main question: Will LVS's market close price on 2026-02-22 be higher than its market close price on 2026-02-15?

Stock splits and reverse splits will be accounted for in resolving this question. Forecasts on questions about companies that have been delisted (through mergers or bankruptcy) will resolve to their final close price.

variables.name: macao_gaming_revenue_growth
variables.description: The year-over-year percentage change in total Macao Gross Gaming Revenue (GGR) for the month of February 2026 compared to February 2025.

variables.name: lvs_relative_strength_index
variables.description: The 14-day Relative Strength Index (RSI) of Las Vegas Sands Corp. stock as of the market close on 2026-02-15, indicating overbought or oversold conditions.

variables.name: vix_index_volatility
variables.description: The closing value of the CBOE Volatility Index (VIX) on 2026-02-15, serving as a proxy for broader market risk and uncertainty.

variables.name: major_analyst_rating_downgrade
variables.description: Whether any of the top 5 investment banks (Goldman Sachs, Morgan Stanley, J.P. Morgan, BofA, or Citi) issues a rating downgrade for LVS between 2026-02-15 and 2026-02-22.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will Jama'at Nusrat al-Islam wal-Muslimin (JNIM) take control of Bamako, Mali by 1 June 2026?

variables.name: russian_troop_levels_mali
variables.description: The estimated number of Russian Africa Corps (formerly Wagner Group) personnel stationed in Mali as of May 1, 2026. A significant drawdown would indicate a weakening of the Malian government's defensive backbone.

variables.name: jnim_control_regional_capitals
variables.description: The total number of Malian regional capitals (e.g., Timbuktu, Gao, Mopti) under confirmed JNIM administrative control by May 1, 2026. Taking the capital Bamako is highly unlikely without first securing regional hubs.

variables.name: bamako_airport_operational_status
variables.description: Whether Modibo Keita International Airport in Bamako remains under the full operational control of the Malian government and open to international flights as of May 15, 2026. Loss of the airport is a necessary precursor to the city's fall.

variables.name: assimi_goita_leadership_status
variables.description: Whether General Assimi Goita remains the de facto head of state of Mali and resides in the Koulouba Palace as of May 1, 2026. A coup or government collapse often precedes a militant takeover of a capital city.

variables.name: target
variables.description:
The literal answer to the main question: Will BLK's market close price on 2026-03-08 be higher than its market close price on 2026-03-01?

Stock splits and reverse splits will be accounted for in resolving this question. Forecasts on questions about companies that have been delisted (through mergers or bankruptcy) will resolve to their final close price.

variables.name: sp500_weekly_return
variables.description: The percentage return of the S&P 500 index between the close on 2026-03-01 and 2026-03-08. BlackRock's stock is highly correlated with broader market performance.

variables.name: us_10y_treasury_yield_change
variables.description: The absolute change in the yield of the US 10-Year Treasury Note between 2026-03-01 and 2026-03-08. Changes in interest rate expectations significantly impact asset manager valuations.

variables.name: financial_sector_etf_performance
variables.description: The percentage change of the Financial Select Sector SPDR Fund (XLF) between 2026-03-01 and 2026-03-08, reflecting industry-specific sentiment.

variables.name: vix_index_weekly_change
variables.description: The percentage change in the CBOE Volatility Index (VIX) over the specified week. High volatility typically correlates with downward pressure on financial stocks like BLK.
